svg.text: Crabitat Architecture — UI / Control Plane / Database / Agents
api/repos api/workflows api/workflows/sync api/prompt-files api/prompt-files/preview api/settings api/skills api/missions
api/repos/[id]/issues api/repos/[id]/languages api/repos/[id]/queue api/github/repos (gh CLI) api/fs/browse (local FS)
GET /healthz GET /v1/status (snapshot) GET/POST /v1/settings WS /v1/ws/console (broadcast) AppState: SQLite + CrabChannels + WorkflowRegistry + GitHubClient
Loads TOML manifest → resolves include paths → renders prompt templates → creates DAG of tasks | WorkflowRegistry from .agent-prompts/workflows/
FK: missions.repo_id → repos | tasks.mission_id → missions | runs.task_id → tasks | github_issues_cache.repo_id → repos (CASCADE) | task_deps: task_id → depends_on_task_id
3. git worktree add burrows/<task> → write CLAUDE.md
Heartbeat every 30s | crab_prompt.md template | Burrow = isolated worktree
Envelope { message_id, mission_id, task_id, run_id, from, to, kind, sent_at_ms }
Kinds: TaskAssigned TaskProgress RunUpdate RunComplete Heartbeat | crabitat-core: shared domain types (Mission, Task, Run, Status enums, Metrics)
Updated 2026-02-26 — adds shared types layer, github_issues_cache table, issue cache with TTL
